CustomField.formula:
CASE( Subsidiary__c, "Parent Company : SimilarWeb Inc","Similarweb Inc",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Similarweb FR","SimilarWeb France SAS ",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb IL","Similarweb Ltd. ",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb AU","Similarweb Australia Pty Ltd",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb JP","SimilarWeb Japan K.K. ",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK","Similarweb UK Ltd. ",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb DE","Similarweb Germany GmbH ",
"Parent Company : Similarweb SGD","Similarweb SG Pte Ltd ",
null )
CustomField.label: Subsidiary for document
